meta.title: 10 Nano BANANA Prompts You Need To Try Right Now!
meta.description:
10 Nano BANANA Prompts You Need To Try Right Now!
Try Nano Banana 👉 http://openart.ai/home/?ref=nanobananaprompts

In this tutorial I show you 10 unique prompts to create images and videos using Nano Banana. Google gemini released Nano banana and it is honestly insane. It is one of the best image models currently out there, but you just gotta learn how to use it. In this tutorial I breakdown how to use nano banana in various different workflows to create some insane images and videos. 

👉My Ai Toolkit - https://dankieft.carrd.co/
My toolkit gives you over 30+ ai tools that I've gathered over the years and use daily. You'll also get access to my free newsletter that educates you about the latest ai tools.
